name: Varsity Cinema
notes: Des Moines Film Society (nonprofit); est. 1938, reopened 2022 after restoration. Same Filmbot WordPress REST route as Gateway (/wp-json/nj/v1/showtime/listings). Coords approx — verify.

name: Music Box Theatre
notes: Independent, operating since 1929. Sucuri Cloudproxy JS challenge fronts the whole site (probed 2026-07-05: no JSON/XHR reachable without the challenge cookie; /rss.xml bypasses it but is empty). Drupal underneath. ADAPTER (2026-07-06): Playwright headless with honest bot UA passes the challenge; parse the /calendar month grid (#dayN cells, .programming- content blocks, .times links; format in .film-format e.g. DCP/35mm). Calendar shows NO film year — TMDb matching is title-only for this venue. Film detail pages (/films-and-events/{slug}) do show year/director; a future improvement could fetch those for year disambiguation. Coords are approximate — confirm before relying on the distance filter.

name: Gene Siskel Film Center
notes: Nonprofit, part of the School of the Art Institute of Chicago. Verify address (State St.), listings_url, and ticketing platform.

name: Kan-Kan Cinema & Bar
notes: Operated by Indianapolis Film Project, Inc. (501c3). WordPress site that SERVER-RENDERS listings — requests + BeautifulSoup works, no headless needed. Events at /events/{slug}/. Checkout hands off to Elevent (goelevent.com/Kan-KanCinemaandBrasserie). EASY archetype; Elevent backs other Midwest venues so this adapter should amortize — check for an Elevent JSON search endpoint before hard-parsing HTML.

name: Cinema Center
notes: Nonprofit; one of Indiana's only dedicated arthouses; hosts Hobnobben Film Festival. Eventive tenant (bucket + public api_key discovered from the tenant JS bundle at runtime). Screens show as "Main Theater" and "Spectator Lounge" in event data. Address/coords from research report — re-verify against their visit page.

name: Hi-Pointe Theatre
notes: St. Louis' only nonprofit-owned movie theatre (operated by Cinema St. Louis). Historic 1922 single-screen plus micro "Backlot" screen. Eventive tenant hi-pointe.eventive.org. Coords approx — verify. 2026-07-06: adapter works but their Eventive schedule is currently EMPTY (their own page says "Nothing scheduled") — they may publish week-by-week or be between platforms; re-check in a few weeks.

name: Gateway Film Center
notes: Nonprofit (Gateway Film Foundation, 501c3), Sundance satellite venue, adjacent to Ohio State. Filmbot WordPress plugin exposes /wp-json/nj/v1/showtime/listings — one JSON call, all upcoming showtimes. Series like "Cult 101" appear inside movie names. Coords approx — verify.

name: The Neon
notes: Dayton's premier arthouse (nonprofit). PROBED 2026-07-06: runs Filmbot's NEWER hosted product — a React SPA making GraphQL POSTs to www.neonmovies.com/graphql (NOT the WP plugin REST route Gateway and Varsity use). Needs a filmbot_graphql adapter: capture the SPA's showtimes query payload (Playwright network log) and replay it.

name: Cleveland Institute of Art Cinematheque
notes: "One of the country's best repertory movie theaters" (NYT); program of the Cleveland Institute of Art; Filmbot checkout per research report. PROBED 2026-07-06: cia.edu answers every request with a 307 challenge loop for non-browser clients — needs a headless probe to find where the Filmbot listings actually live (possibly a subdomain).

name: Oriental Theatre
notes: Milwaukee Film (nonprofit, est. 2008); historic 1927 movie palace, 35mm/70mm reinstated after renovation; hosts Milwaukee Film Festival. Shares an Eventive bucket with the Downer — venue_match claims only events whose Eventive venue name contains "oriental". Coords approx.

name: Downer Theatre
notes: Milwaukee Film's second historic cinema (1915, Milwaukee's oldest operating movie house). Same Eventive bucket as the Oriental; venue_match "downer". Coords approx.
